{{DISPLAYTITLE:Tower of Memory Exploration}}
{{Season Tabs}}__NOTOC__
==Overview==
'''Tower of Memory''' takes place at the [[Serene Lyceum]] and its surrounding areas.

==Regions==
* [[Starfall County]]
* [[Interrealm]]
* [[Simulacrum Isles]]
* [[Skyrealm Forest]]
* [[Stellar Hall]]

==Exploration Journal==

Completing this region awards:
{{Card List|mini=1|Origami Hamster*20;Origami Hamster*20;Origami Hamster*20;Hat Trick;Diamond*200}}
